_comment: SS Electric — Phase B1 opponent deck, restructured 2026-05-18 to showcase active Poké-Powers for the W4 CPU. Three lines, three different active powers the AI can fire: Magneton (DR_17, power_discard_hand_recover_basic_energy — fires once basic Lightning is in discard), Delcatty (RS_5, power_discard_energy_draw_n — fires whenever Delcatty is in play and the deck has energies in hand), Pichu (SS_20, power_baby_evolution — now actually triggerable because the deck ships Pikachu (SS_72) as the evolve-into). Mareep/Flaaffy stays for a non-power basic line. Plusle/Minun/Elekid removed: their abilities were either passive-only or required cards the deck didn't ship. Lives in data/decks/opponents/ so it does not appear in the human deck picker.
